fonts.usage: H1, H2, H3, large stat numbers
Body text, labels, forms, UI elements

rules.headings: Left-aligned, tracking-tight for large text, never centered unless specific card. Use font-medium or font-semibold for numbers. Must use Cormorant Garamond.
rules.body: leading-relaxed, tracking-normal, highly legible. Must use Manrope.

layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8, p-12) on containers. Tailwind spacing scale.
layout.structure: Bento 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. 3 columns max on desktop. Sidebar or asymmetric layout.
layout.alignment: Asymmetric, heavily left-aligned to provide optical clarity.
layout.surface: Glassmorphism ('Crystal' variant) for all cards over the 3D background. Use classes: `bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl`

components.cards: Cardless feel but with glass boundaries. No harsh shadows. Border radius 24px (rounded-3xl). Inside padding must be generous (p-6 or p-8).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Dark charcoal background with white text for primary actions. Hover states lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5).
components.inputs: Clean lines, border-b only or subtle rounded-xl with light bg. Focus ring is essential. Use Shadcn-like logic but style organically.
components.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, thick lines/bars matching the income/expense colors. No grid lines or very faint lines to keep it organic.

threejs_concept.description: An interactive, slow-rotating organic blob (Sphere with MeshDistortMaterial) sitting in the background. It serves as a 'Wealth Aura' and provides the visual heartbeat of the app.
threejs_concept.reaction_rules: Balance > 0: Blob expands, distorts smoothly, and glows softly with Sage green (#4C7A5D). Balance <= 0: Blob shrinks, distortion gets slightly erratic, colors shift to Terracotta (#A25F56). On new transaction: A quick scale pulse/ripple.

motion.page_load: Staggered fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) for dashboard cards using framer-motion.

image_urls.description: Profile picture of user for the top header

accessibility.data_testid_rule: All buttons, inputs, list items, and key textual elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='add-transaction-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glassmorphism meets APCA contrast standards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize a React app if not already present. Install all listed dependencies using yarn.
Import Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond and Manrope in the main HTML/CSS.
Set up Tailwind CSS configuration incorporating the custom colors and fonts.
Create a Data Context or Zustand store to manage transactions array, balance calculation, and total income/expenses. Data MUST be saved to localStorage.

Create a ThreeJSBackground component wrapping a Canvas. Render a Sphere with MeshDistortMaterial from drei. Tie its color/distort/scale to the user's balance via the shared state. Place this fixed at the back (z-[-1]).

Build the dashboard layout: Left side with large balance display and 'Add Transaction' form. Right side with 'Bento' style glassmorphism cards for Charts (Donut for categories, Area/Line for spending over time) and Recent Transactions list.
Build an 'Add Transaction' form with fields: Type (Income/Expense), Category, Amount, Note, Date. Categories should be distinct for Income vs Expense.
Implement transaction deletion from the list.
Use Recharts for the AreaChart (Income/Expense trends) and PieChart (Categories). Customize their tooltips and remove default cartesian grid lines.
Include an 'Export to CSV' button that dynamically generates a data URI from the transactions array and downloads a file.
Apply Framer Motion to animate the UI elements on load with a staggered effect.
